name: node-error-monitor
author: Behzad Qasim <behzadqasim.dev@gmail.com>
description: Automated global error and host exception tracking SDK for Node.js applications.

scripts.build: javascript-obfuscator src/index.js --output index.js --compact true --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array true --string-array-encoding rc4 --self-defending false --target node
